what_it_does: Defines a React hook that measures a DOM element's content-box size using ResizeObserver and returns the element ref plus width/height state.
observations: Uses ResizeObserver with entries[0].contentRect to read size.
Seeds initial size from el.clientWidth and el.clientHeight before observation starts.
Hook is generic over T extends HTMLElement and returns { ref, width, height }.
useEffect has an empty dependency array and disconnects the observer on cleanup.
Comment says the measurement is shared by wheel (polar) and separator (two-basin) views.
standouts: Content-box measurement via ResizeObserver rather than window resize.
Generic ref typed to the caller's element type.
conventions: Uses TypeScript generic constraint T extends HTMLElement.
Cleans up ResizeObserver in useEffect return.
Returns ref alongside derived numeric state.
concerns: Initial size uses clientWidth/clientHeight, which include padding, while contentRect is the content box; the two can disagree.
Empty dependency array means the effect does not re-run if the underlying DOM node changes through a ref callback.
notes: A small, reusable measurement hook meant to keep polar and two-basin views aligned to the same container geometry.
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose matches: it observes a container's content box and exposes the measured size.
intention_signals: Provide a single, reusable source of truth for a container's content-box dimensions so layout-dependent views can derive proportions consistently.
contribution: A reusable measurement hook that exposes a ref and live content-box dimensions, which a fused system could keep as a shared sizing primitive.
summary_for_embedding: A React custom hook that uses ResizeObserver to track a DOM element's content-box width and height and returns the element ref plus size state.
intention_for_embedding: Intended to give wheel and separator views a common, live measurement of their shared container region.

symbols.does: Returns a ref and live content-box width/height for a generic HTMLElement.
symbols.description: A React hook that attaches a ResizeObserver to a referenced DOM element, initializes size from clientWidth/clientHeight, and exposes the element ref together with reactive width and height values.
